care.summary: A sculptural bonsai with thick, exposed roots; keep evenly moist in bright indirect light.
care.light: Bright indirect; tolerates some direct morning sun
care.water: When top 2–3 cm of soil dries; reduce in winter
care.soil: Well-draining bonsai mix or coarse potting soil with perlite
care.humidity: Moderate to high; mist or use humidity tray
care.fertilizer: Dilute liquid bonsai feed every 2 weeks spring–summer
care.toxicity: Sap may irritate skin; toxic if ingested (mild)
common_issues: Leaf drop from sudden temperature change or draft
Spider mites and scale in dry air
tips: Prune in spring to maintain bonsai shape
Rotate weekly for even canopy growth
Wipe leaves monthly to prevent dust buildup
Repot every 2–3 years with root pruning
